Class SortQueryBuilder<K>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.core.query.SortQueryBuilder<K>
All Implemented Interfaces:
SortCriterion<K>
public class SortQueryBuilder<K> extends Object
Simple builder class for constructing SortQuery.
Author:
Costin Leau
